selected_issue.issue: Canonical checks fail to run on Linux automation hosts due to missing bootstrap path
selected_issue.title: Add Linux/macOS bootstrap flow so canonical test and replay evidence can be collected

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Rank-2 canonical command failures were reproducible on agent-base (`python3 -m pytest -q` missing pytest and `python3 tools/replay_verification_assess.py` missing fastapi), so lower-ranked issue classes were not eligible this run.

files_changed.change: Added Linux/macOS bootstrap script with .venv311 creation, dependency install, incomplete-venv recovery, and virtualenv fallback.
Documented Linux/macOS bootstrap command in setup instructions.

validation_performed.result: pass; recovered from missing ensurepip by falling back to virtualenv and completed dependency installation

before_after_evidence.before: Canonical test/replay commands failed immediately in clean Linux automation environments due missing dependencies and no Linux bootstrap path.
before_after_evidence.after: scripts/bootstrap.sh enables dependency bootstrap on Linux/macOS, after which canonical pytest and replay assessment run successfully.

unresolved_risks: Playwright host dependency warnings can remain on minimal Linux images if browser system libraries are not installed.
Fix is scoped to environment bootstrap and does not change engine behavior.
stop_reason: Stopped after the selected rank-2 issue was fixed with minimal bounded changes and repeated issue-specific validation; further distro-specific package automation is outside this run scope.
